_comment: DUMMY DATA — Sample Wazuh alert for rule 117005 (suspicious DNS flow)

rule.description: NetFlow: Suspicious DNS flow volume from 192.168.56.50 — high UDP/53 traffic detected

analyst_notes: 120 DNS flows in 60 seconds from 192.168.56.50. Could be DGA, DNS tunneling, or malware polling. Check DNS resolver logs for query names. Is this host running a recursive resolver legitimately?
